name: Disclosure Alpha
description: Deterministic SEC filing disclosure risk scores — parse, diff, score. Language signals only; not investment advice.
prompts: Summarize the overall disclosure risk score and top component drivers for $SYMBOL using @[id:disclosure_company].
Which active risk flags fired in the latest filing shown in @[id:disclosure_company]?
What section changes vs the prior filing stand out in @[id:disclosure_company]?
Compare boilerplate risk vs risk-factor intensity for this company in @[id:disclosure_company].

mcp_servers.name: Disclosure Alpha Analyst
mcp_servers.description: Deterministic 10-K/10-Q scoring and filing discovery — same pipeline as the Company widget.
